patches_added.name: Fix "Restore Comment"
patches_added.description: Fixes the "Restore Comment" feature (requires Sync Ultra) by fetching from an alternative API. Also adds a more accessible button for this feature.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Sync Ultra
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Sync Ultra Lifetime.

patches_added.name: Fix "Restore Comment"
patches_added.description: Fixes the "Restore Comment" feature (requires Sync Ultra) by fetching from an alternative API. Also adds a more accessible button for this feature.

patches_modified.name: Fix "Other Discussions"
patches_modified.description: Fixes the "Other Discussions" feature.

patches_modified.name: Fix imgur links
patches_modified.description: Fixes imgur.com/a/ links to properly display in the image viewer.

patches_modified.name: Fix r/random
patches_modified.description: Restores random subreddit functionality by fetching from an alternative API.

patches_modified.name: Predictive back gesture (Reddit Sync)
patches_modified.description: Enables the predictive back gesture with fixes for Reddit Sync.

patches_modified.name: Spoof client
patches_modified.description: Restores functionality of the app by using custom client ID (default included).

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Projectivy Launcher's premium so the paywall stops sending you to the upgrade screen. Display profiles, custom wallpapers and backgrounds, parental controls, and the locked settings and customization options all open up. The gate is decided on the device, so there is no account to sign in to.
